title: TFC Mantle Mountains
body:
![Banner](https://i.ibb.co/N6kVHqtD/banner.png)

Edits TerraFirmaCraft's mountains to be much larger in scale both vertically and horizontally. Includes a config file where you can change these values to your taste. This mod does not increase the amount of mountains in your world, only the scale. The world height has been increased to 1024 to accommodate these larger mountains. Includes an option to generate snow capped peaks on all mountains regardless of surrounding climate. (Off by default)

Tips on config values:
- Find a vanilla TFC mountain you like (/locate biome tfc:mountains)
- Save the seed of that world and adjust mantle config values to your liking, checking each time that same mountain.
- Anything over 4.0 for vertical scale looks strange/out of place imo.
- Anything over 6.0 will clip world height and get cut off.

![Before-After](https://i.ibb.co/Mx6ZDJRS/before-after.gif)

![Logo](https://i.ibb.co/sX1WSjJ/mantle.png)

Created for my upcoming modpack **Mantle**.
